description_long: This helmet features a futuristic, high-tech design with a predominantly white and dark metallic shell, accented by weathered scratches and wear marks. The front displays a large, dark-tinted visor with intricate circuit-like patterns and a glowing blue circular element, suggesting advanced heads-up display capabilities. On both sides, robust mechanical modules with hoses and gold details are attached, possibly for communication or environmental control. The rear is smooth and rounded, with two horizontal black vent-like structures and metallic fasteners. The surface finish is a mix of matte and glossy, with visible scuffs and signs of use, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The overall form is aerodynamic and protective, suitable for urban or sci-fi environments.
description: A futuristic, white and dark metallic helmet with a large tinted visor, glowing blue front element, and robust side modules with hoses and gold accents. The surface is weathered, combining matte and glossy finishes for a rugged, high-tech look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large dark visor with circuit-like patterns, a glowing blue circular element, and detailed front paneling.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the mechanical side module with hoses, gold accents, and visible surface scratches.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a smooth, rounded white shell with two black vent-like structures and metallic fasteners.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side module, hoses, and additional wear marks.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two horizontal vent-like structures at the rear, rectangular in shape, with no visible front or top vents.
attribute_graphic_design: Abstract circuit-like patterns on the visor, weathered surface with scratches and scuffs, no text or prominent imagery.
